zh.Estouteville-Écalles, Normandy, France: 法國諾門迪瑟-馬利艾斯陶迪維爾-艾卡利斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick de Stuteville de Schypwith於大約1120年出生在英國越可爾斯吉維茲時，他的父親Robert de Stuteville III46歲，母親Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith42歲。他和Beatrix de Langton至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1174年在英國越可爾享年56歲。

zh-hans.Estouteville-Écalles, Normandy, France: 法国諾門迪瑟-馬利艾斯陶迪維爾-艾卡利斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick de Stuteville de Schypwith于大约1120年出生在英国越可爾斯吉維茲时，他的父亲Robert de Stuteville III46岁，母亲Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith42岁。他和Beatrix de Langton至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1174年在英国越可爾享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick de Stuteville de Schypwith was born about 1120, in Skipwith, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert de Stuteville III, was 46 and his mother, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, was 42. He had at least 1 son with Beatrix de Langton. He died about 1174, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick de Stuteville de Schypwith est né environ 1120, à Skipwith, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Stuteville III, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Beatrix de Langton. Il est décédé environ 1174, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick de Stuteville de Schypwith um 1120 in Skipwith, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Stuteville III 46 und seine Mutter Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith 42. Er hatte mit Beatrix de Langton mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1174 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick de Stuteville de Schypwith è nato il circa 1120 nel Skipwith, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Stuteville III, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Beatrix de Langton. Morì circa 1174, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick de Stuteville de Schypwithが約1120年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスキプウィスで生まれた時，父Robert de Stuteville IIIは46歳，母Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwithは42歳であった。彼はBeatrix de Langtonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1174年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick de Stuteville de Schypwith(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 요르크실르 스키p위스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Stuteville III(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Beatrix de Langton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1174년 영국 요르크실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1120–about 1174: tany ho any amin'ny 1120–tany ho any amin'ny 1174

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick de Stuteville de Schypwith nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Skipwith, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Stuteville III, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Beatrix de Langton. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1174, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick de Stuteville de Schypwith родился около 1120 г. в местности скипвит, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Stuteville III было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, 42. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Beatrix de Langton. Он умер около 1174 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

sm.about 1120–about 1174: e tusa o le 1120–e tusa o le 1174

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patrick de Stuteville de Schypwith nació aproximadamente 1120, en Skipwith, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Stuteville III, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Beatrix de Langton. Murió aproximadamente 1174, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
